llm_model.name: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview
llm_model.rate_limits: Text-out caps (max RPM / TPM / RPD from usage vs limit UI): 25 RPM, 2M TPM, 250 RPD. Token pricing: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing#standard

llm_model.name: Gemini 3 Flash Preview
llm_model.rate_limits: Text-out caps (max RPM / TPM / RPD): 1K RPM, 2M TPM, 10K RPD. Token pricing: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing#standard

llm_model.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
llm_model.rate_limits: Text-out caps (max RPM / TPM / RPD): 150 RPM, 2M TPM, 1K RPD. Token pricing: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing#standard

llm_model.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
llm_model.rate_limits: Text-out caps (max RPM / TPM / RPD): 1K RPM, 1M TPM, 10K RPD. Token pricing: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing#standard

llm_model.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite
llm_model.rate_limits: Not listed separately in operator chart; typically aligns with Flash-Lite tier on https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits. Standard token pricing: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing#standard

llm_model.name: Gemini 2.0 Flash
llm_model.rate_limits: Text-out caps (max RPM / TPM / RPD): 2K RPM, 4M TPM, unlimited RPD. Deprecated ~2026-06-01. Token pricing: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing#standard

llm_model.name: Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite
llm_model.rate_limits: Not listed separately in operator chart; see https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits. Deprecated ~2026-06-01. Standard token pricing: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing#standard
